title: Pizza
body: The Pizza Mod introduces the ability to craft and eat pizzas within Minecraft, adding a new culinary dimension to the game. Players can gather essential ingredients such as cheese, tomatoes, and bread, which are now available through various means. Cheese can be made from milk collected from cows, tomatoes can be grown from new tomato plants, and bread can be crafted from wheat. These ingredients allow for the creation of basic pizzas, providing players with a fun and interactive way to enhance their in-game dining options. Whether you are farming, foraging, or crafting, the Pizza Mod adds a tasty twist to your Minecraft adventures.
